subject: An elf druid with green-tinted skin, glowing green eyes, and dark hair, posed in a forward-facing portrait. Insect-like wings or chitinous carapace structures fan out from the shoulders, and the figure wears layered green-and-brown druidic garb suggestive of leaves and bark.
description: A close mid-shot portrait of a green-skinned elf druid centered in the frame against a dim, mossy green-black backdrop. The figure faces the viewer directly, with luminous pale-green eyes and a calm, focused expression. Dark hair is pulled back, and translucent insectile wings or hardened carapace plates rise from the shoulders like a mantle. The clothing is layered in mottled green and umber tones with leaf-like edges, blending into the foliage-dappled background. The lighting is soft and ambient with a faint internal glow on the eyes and skin, giving the figure a quietly numinous, fey quality.
foreground: elf druid figure with insectile shoulder-wings, layered leafy garb
background: indistinct dim forest interior, mottled greens and browns
